---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
link-external-newwindow: true
---

::: {style="background-color: #C2352F"}
::: {style="color: #FFFFFF"}
::: grid
::: g-col-4
![](images/Bsta513.png){fig-align="center" width="337"}
:::

::: g-col-7
# BSTA 513/613: Categorical Data Analysis

### Spring 2026

 

Welcome to BSTA 513/613! In this course, we will continue to learn about regression analysis, but not with categorical outcomes. We will build some theoretical understanding in order to interpret and apply logistic regression models appropriately. We will learn how to build a logistic regression model, interpret the model and coefficients, and diagnose potential issues with our model.
 
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {style="background-color: #F2EFEA"}
::: {style="color: #000"}

::: columns

::: {.column width="2%"}
:::

::: {.column width="16%"}
### Links

[{{< iconify material-symbols folder size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} [OneDrive Folder](https://ohsuitg-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/personal/wakim_ohsu_edu/Documents/Teaching/Classes/BSTA_513_26S/Student_files_BSTA_513?csf=1&web=1&e=Q8KOMt)

[{{< iconify mdi video size=28px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"}[Echo 360](https://echo360.org/section/87bbad0a-58f2-4758-a290-b95378fbbab4/home)
:::

::: {.column width="17%"}
### Instructor

[{{< iconify fluent person-24-filled size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} [Dr. Nicky Wakim](instructors.qmd)

[{{< iconify bi building-fill size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} Vanport 622A

[{{< iconify tabler mail-filled size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} [wakim\@ohsu.edu](mailto:wakim@ohsu.edu)

[{{< iconify icon-park-solid time size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} W 3-4pm
:::

::: {.column width="22%"}
### Office Hours
::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
[Sheetal](https://ohsu.webex.com/meet/akula)

[Kelsey](https://pdx.zoom.us/j/88514661813)

[Sophia](https://ohsu.webex.com/ohsu/j.php?MTID=mdbce9989431762f801161e75dd8f444f)
:::
::: {.column width="70%"}
[{{< iconify icon-park-solid time size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} F 12-1pm

[{{< iconify icon-park-solid time size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} Th 3:30-4:30pm

[{{< iconify icon-park-solid time size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} T 10:30-11:30am
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column width="21%"}
### Course details

[{{< iconify fa6-solid calendar-days size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} Mondays, Wednesdays

[{{< iconify fa6-solid calendar size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} March 30 - June 9

[{{< iconify icon-park-solid time size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} 1:00 PM - 2:50 PM

[{{< iconify fa6-solid person-chalkboard size=24px >}}]{style="color:#C2352F;"} In-person, RLSB 3A001
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
### Contacting me

E-mail or Slack is the best way to get in contact with me. I will try to respond to all course-related e-mails within 24 hours Monday-Friday.
:::
:::

:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: grid
::: g-col-9
:::

::: g-col-3
[{{< iconify icomoon-free github size=24px >}} View the source on GitHub](https://github.com/nwakim/BSTA_513_S25)
:::
:::
